stemHtml: What is the definition of the Maximum Take-Off Mass of an aeroplane?

options.a: It is the maximum permissible mass of a loaded aeroplane before leaving the parking stand.
options.b: It is the maximum permissible total aeroplane mass at the start of the take-off run.
options.c: It is a take-off limited mass which is variable according to the runway strength of the departure aerodrome.
options.d: It is a performance-limited take-off mass which is affected by atmospheric pressure and temperature.
